subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm and steadfast in the Covenant! That which thou didst write concerning Za'imu'd-Dawlih hath been noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت نابت بر پیمان آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید در خصوص زعیم الدوله ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @personal instructions, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
